title: Frozen Dots
description: Frozen Themed For Crystal PvP And SMP PvP.
body:
Frozen Themed Pack, Custom Crystal And Custom Anchor, Made For Cpvp (Crystal PvP) And SMP.

First Offical Pack That I Put Hours Into, Im Planning To Release Much Much Much Better Texture Packs, My Discord Is The Same As My Username On here.
Im New To Making Texture Packs And I Can Make Custom Texture Packs! Just Add My Discord: 963m_ And We'll Work Something Out! NOTE: Im A Beginner Texture Pack Maker/Designer, I Can't Make Anything That Crazy, I take Paypal And Crypto As Payment, Im extremely Cheap And Im Doing This To Show My Work.
